node_37.subject: Isabella Rodriguez
node_37.description: conversing about Isabella Rodriguez and Mei Lin discussing party planning tips for a Valentine's Day party at a cafe, including decorations, snacks, and games.
node_37.embedding_key: conversing about Isabella Rodriguez and Mei Lin discussing party planning tips for a Valentine's Day party at a cafe, including decorations, snacks, and games.
filling: Hey Mei Lin! It's great to see you here! Are you headed to Oak Hill College for class? I hope you’re doing well. I'm just out shopping for decorations for the Valentine's Day party at the cafe tomorrow. Any last-minute tips for party planning?

Hi Isabella! Yes, I'm just about to head to class. For party planning, I think it's great to have a mix of fun games and some tasty treats. Maybe you could set up a photo booth with props? That always gets people involved! How are the preparations going?

That's a fantastic idea, Mei Lin! A photo booth would definitely add some fun to the party. I'm also planning to have some heart-shaped cookies and maybe some drinks. Do you have any favorite snacks you think I should include? And good luck with your class!

Thank you, Isabella! Heart-shaped cookies sound perfect for the occasion! Maybe you could also include some fruit skewers or chocolate-covered strawberries; they’re always a hit! I really appreciate your good luck wishes. Let me know how the party turns out!

Those are great suggestions, Mei Lin! I’ll definitely consider the fruit skewers and chocolate-covered strawberries. I really appreciate your help. I hope you have a wonderful day at Oak Hill College! Let's catch up after the party so I can tell you all about it!
Thank you, Isabella! I’m looking forward to hearing all about the party. Have fun with the preparations, and if you need any more help, feel free to reach out! I should get going now, but take care!

node_7.subject: Isabella Rodriguez
node_7.description: This is Isabella Rodriguez's plan for Friday February 13: wake up and complete the morning routine at 8:00 am, open Hobbs Cafe at 8:00 am, prepare for the Valentine's Day party by gathering decorations and party materials from 9:00 am to 11:00 am, serve customers and manage the cafe from 11:00 am to 4:00 pm, take a quick break for lunch at 4:00 pm, continue serving customers and finalizing party details from 4:30 pm to 7:00 pm.
